title: gilia attenuata f. helleri
intro: Gilia attenuata f. helleri, also known as Heller's gilia or white gilia, is a flowering plant native to California and Mexico, belonging to the Polemoniaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Gilia attenuata f. helleri is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies and traditional folk medicine.
